home.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
home.faq.a1: Tool Box Nova is a free online platform offering 50+ tools for privacy protection, development, and multimedia. No registration required, all tools work directly in your browser.
home.faq.q2: Is Tool Box Nova free to use?
home.faq.a2: Yes! All tools on Tool Box Nova are completely free with no hidden fees or usage limits. We believe everyone should have access to quality tools without barriers.
home.faq.q3: Is my data safe on Tool Box Nova?
home.faq.a3: Absolutely. Most tools process data directly in your browser (client-side). We never store your files or personal information on our servers. Your privacy is our top priority.
home.faq.q4: Do I need to create an account?
home.faq.a4: No account needed. All tools are available instantly without registration. Just visit the tool you need and start using it right away.
home.faq.q5: What types of tools does Tool Box Nova offer?
home.faq.a5: We offer privacy tools (SMS receiver, temp email, password generator), developer tools (JSON, regex, Base64), image tools (compress, crop, remove background), AI tools, and more.

home.seo.title: Your All-in-One Online Tool Platform
home.seo.intro: is a comprehensive collection of free online tools designed for developers, designers, and privacy-conscious users. All tools run directly in your browser, ensuring your data never leaves your device. Whether you need to generate secure passwords, process images, format JSON, or protect your privacy, we have the tools you need.
home.seo.privacy_desc: Our privacy tools help you protect your personal information and maintain anonymity online:
home.seo.sms_detail: Receive verification SMS without using your real phone number. Perfect for signing up for websites and services while keeping your personal number private.
home.seo.email_detail: Generate disposable email addresses that automatically expire after 10 minutes. Ideal for one-time registrations and avoiding spam.
home.seo.password_detail: Create cryptographically secure random passwords with customizable length, character sets, and complexity options.
home.seo.address_detail: Generate realistic fake addresses and identity information for testing, form filling, or protecting your real location.
home.seo.dev_desc: Essential utilities for web developers, software engineers, and IT professionals:
home.seo.json_detail: A complete JSON toolkit with 40+ tools including formatting, validation, conversion, minification, diff comparison, and JSONPath queries.
home.seo.hash_detail: Calculate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512, and HMAC hashes for text and files. All processing happens client-side for maximum security.
home.seo.base64_detail: Encode and decode Base64 strings with support for text, files up to 50MB, Base64URL format, and MIME line splitting.
home.seo.regex_detail: Test and debug regular expressions with real-time matching, syntax highlighting, and explanation of match groups.
home.seo.media_desc: Process images without uploading to any server — everything runs in your browser:
home.seo.compress_detail: Compress JPG, PNG, and WebP images while maintaining quality. Batch process up to 30 images at once.
home.seo.removebg_detail: Remove image backgrounds using AI technology that runs entirely in your browser. Perfect for product photos, portraits, and logos.
home.seo.qr_detail: Generate QR codes for URLs, WiFi credentials, vCards, and more. Customize colors, size, and error correction level.
home.seo.why_intro: We built Tool Box Nova with a focus on privacy, speed, and accessibility:
home.seo.why_privacy_desc: Most tools process data entirely in your browser. We never see, store, or transmit your files or data to any server.
home.seo.why_nosignup_desc: All tools are available instantly without creating an account. No email verification, no passwords to remember.
home.seo.why_browser_desc: No software to download or install. Works on any device with a modern browser — desktop, tablet, or mobile.
home.seo.why_free_desc: All 50+ tools are free to use with no hidden fees, premium tiers, or usage limits. Supported by minimal, non-intrusive ads.
home.seo.conclusion: Whether you're a developer needing quick access to encoding tools, a designer working with images, or someone who values online privacy, Tool Box Nova provides the tools you need — fast, free, and private. Bookmark this page and access your favorite tools anytime, anywhere.
